Gibbs Sampling Implementation on 5d Half Normal Distribution

Yiqiao Jin

2023年01月02日

R package

1 library(MASS)
2 library(clusterGeneration)
3 library(base)
4 library(dplyr)
5 library(rstanarm)
6 library(bayesplot)
7 library(ggplot2)
8 library(purrr)
9 library(tidyr)
10 library(reshape2)
11 library(latex2exp)
12 library(ggpubr)
13 library(hexbin)

Indicator function of random vector X

1 Indicator <- function(x){
2   return(ifelse(FALSE %in% ifelse(x >= 0, TRUE, FALSE), 0, 1))
3 }

symbolic function

1 s_f <- function(q, n){
2   sign <- matrix(0, n, length(q))
3   for(i in 1:n){
4     sign[i,] <- sample(c(-1,1), length(q), replace = TRUE)
5   }
6   sign <- unique(sign)
7   return(sign)
8 }

symbolic matrix

1 symbolic_as_diag <- function(vector){
2   return(diag(vector))
3 }

Folded Normal Sampling Funcion

1 FN_Sampling <- function(u, sig){
2   sample <- abs(rnorm(1, mean = u, sd = sqrt(sig)))
3   return(sample)
4 }

Mixing Folded Normal Sampling Funcion

1 Mixing_Sample <- function(N,d,com,pos,x,Sigma){
2   det <- det(Sigma)
3   Sigma_ac <- det * solve(Sigma) 
4   Sigma_e <- Sigma[-pos, -pos]
5   det_e <- det(Sigma_e)
6   Sigma_e_ac <- det_e * solve(Sigma_e)
7   eps <- rep(0,com)
8   for(k in 1:com){
9     for(i in 1:(d-1)){
10       for(j in 1:(d-1)){
11         eps[k] <- eps[k] - 0.5 / det_e * symbolic[k,-pos][i] * x[i] * symbolic[k,-pos][j] * x[j] * Sigma_e_ac[i,j]
12       }
13     }
14   }
15   eps_matrix <- matrix(rep(eps,com),byrow = T,com,com)
16   for(i in 1:com){
17     eps_matrix[i,] <- eps_matrix[i,] - eps_matrix[i,i]
18   }
19   eps_matrix <- exp(eps_matrix)
20   normal_con <- 1/apply(eps_matrix, 1, sum)
21   normal_con[is.na(normal_con)] <- 0
22   u <- (1 / det_e) * symbolic[,-pos] %*% matrix(x * Sigma_ac[pos,][-pos], ncol = 1)
23   sig <- det / det_e 
24   choice <- sample(c(1:nrow(symbolic)),1,prob = normal_con, replace = T)
25   sample <- FN_Sampling(u[choice],sig)
26   return(sample)
27 }

Gibbs Sampling Function

1 Gibbs <- function(N,x_init,Sig){
2   x_seq <- matrix(0, N, 5)
3   x_seq1 <- x_seq2 <- x_seq3 <- x_seq4 <- rep(0,4)
4   x_seq[1,] <- x_init
5   for (i in 2:N){
6     ## x1|
7     x_seq1 <- x_seq[i - 1, -1]
8     x_seq[i, 1] <- Mixing_Sample(N = 1, d = 5, com = nrow(symbolic),
9                                  pos = 1, x = x_seq1, Sigma = Sig)
10     ## x2
11     x_seq2 <- c(x_seq[i, 1],x_seq1[-1])
12     x_seq[i, 2] <- Mixing_Sample(N = 1, d = 5, com = nrow(symbolic),
13                                  pos = 2, x = x_seq2, Sigma = Sig)
14     ## x3
15     x_seq3 <- c(x_seq[i, 1:2],x_seq1[-(1:2)])
16     x_seq[i, 3] <- Mixing_Sample(N = 1, d = 5, com = nrow(symbolic),
17                                  pos = 3, x = x_seq3, Sigma = Sig)
18     ## x4
19     x_seq4 <- c(x_seq[i, 1:3],x_seq1[-(1:3)])
20     x_seq[i, 4] <- Mixing_Sample(N = 1, d = 5, com = nrow(symbolic),
21                                  pos = 4, x = x_seq3, Sigma = Sig)
22     ## x5
23     x_seq5 <- x_seq[i, 1:4]
24     x_seq[i, 5] <- Mixing_Sample(N = 1, d = 5, com = nrow(symbolic),
25                                  pos = 5, x = x_seq4, Sigma = Sig)
26     
27   }
28   return(x_seq)
29 }

Correlation

1 est_corr <- function(sig1, sig2, rho){
2   intergrand <- function(x){
3     x^2 * 2 * dnorm(x) * pnorm(x * rho/sqrt(1 - rho^2))
4   }
5   intergal <- integrate(intergrand, 0, Inf)$value - 0.5
6   cov <- 2 * sqrt(sig1) * sqrt(sig2) * {(1 - rho^2) * sqrt(1 - rho^2)/pi + rho * intergal} - 2 * sqrt(sig1) * sqrt(sig2)/pi
7   sig1 <- sig1 * (1 - 2/pi)
8   sig2 <- sig2 * (1 - 2/pi)
9   cor <- cov/sqrt(sig1 * sig2)
10   return(cor)
11 }

Input parameters

1 set.seed(1010)
2 eigen <- rexp(5,0.5)
3 symbolic <- s_f(1:5, 1000)
4 com <- nrow(symbolic)
5 Sigma <- genPositiveDefMat(dim = 5,
6                            covMethod = "eigen",
7                            eigenvalue = eigen)$Sigma
8 N <- 10000
9 Chain_n <- 4
10 x_initial <- list(first = 0, second = 0, third = 0, fourth = 0)
11 x_init <- x_initial[[1]] <-matrix(c(0.5, 0.5, 1.5, 1.5, 1.0), ncol = 5)
12 x_initial[[2]] <- matrix(c(1.0, 1.5,0.5,1.0, 0.5), ncol = 5)
13 x_initial[[3]] <- matrix(c(1.5, 1.0, 1.0, 0.5, 1.5), ncol = 5)
14 x_initial[[4]] <- matrix(c(1.0, 0.5,1.0, 1.0, 1.5), ncol = 5)

Simulation

1 set.seed(1010)
2 sample_p1 <- sample_p2 <- sample_p3 <- sample_p4 <- sample_p5 <- 0
3 Chain_all <- list(Chain1 = 0, Chain2 = 0, Chain3 = 0, Chain4 = 0)
4 t_start <- Sys.time()
5 for(j in 1:Chain_n){
6   result <- Gibbs(N,x_init,Sigma)
7   Chain_all[[j]] <- result
8   if(j == 1){
9     sample_p1 <- result[,1]
10     sample_p2 <- result[,2]
11     sample_p3 <- result[,3]
12     sample_p4 <- result[,4]
13     sample_p5 <- result[,5]
14   }
15   else{
16     sample_p1 <- c(sample_p1, result[,1])
17     sample_p2 <- c(sample_p2, result[,2])
18     sample_p3 <- c(sample_p3, result[,3])
19     sample_p4 <- c(sample_p4, result[,4])
20     sample_p5 <- c(sample_p5, result[,5])
21   }
22   if(j != Chain_n){
23     x_init = x_initial[[j+1]]
24   }
25 }
26 t_end <- Sys.time()
27 t_end - t_start
## Time difference of 2.423655 mins

Data in array

1 dim2 <- paste0("Chain:", 1:4)
2 dim3 <- paste0("theta", "[",1:5,"]")
3 sample_array <- array(c(sample_p1,sample_p2,sample_p3,sample_p4,sample_p5),c(N,4,5),dimnames = list(NULL,dim2,dim3))
4 names(dimnames(sample_array)) <- c("Iteration", "Chain", "Parameter")

ergodic mean plot

1 ## Ergodic data
2 Chain_Para1_erg <-
3   sample_array[,,1] %>%
4   as.data.frame() %>%
5   mutate(Iteration=seq_len(N)) %>%
6   melt(id.vars = "Iteration", measure.vars = paste0("Chain:",1:4),variable.name = "Chain",value.name = "Para") %>%
7   group_by(Chain) %>%
8   mutate(ergodic_mean = cumsum(Para)/seq_len(N),
9          Theta = "theta1") %>%
10   as.data.frame()
11 Chain_Para2_erg <-
12   sample_array[,,2] %>%
13   as.data.frame() %>%
14   mutate(Iteration=seq_len(N)) %>%
15   melt(id.vars = "Iteration", measure.vars = paste0("Chain:",1:4),variable.name = "Chain",value.name = "Para") %>%
16   group_by(Chain) %>%
17   mutate(ergodic_mean = cumsum(Para)/seq_len(N),
18          Theta = "theta2") %>%
19   as.data.frame()
20 Chain_Para3_erg <-
21   sample_array[,,3] %>%
22   as.data.frame() %>%
23   mutate(Iteration=seq_len(N)) %>%
24   melt(id.vars = "Iteration", measure.vars = paste0("Chain:",1:4),variable.name = "Chain",value.name = "Para") %>%
25   group_by(Chain) %>%
26   mutate(ergodic_mean = cumsum(Para)/seq_len(N),
27          Theta = "theta3") %>%
28   as.data.frame()
29 Chain_Para4_erg <-
30   sample_array[,,4] %>%
31   as.data.frame() %>%
32   mutate(Iteration=seq_len(N)) %>%
33   melt(id.vars = "Iteration", measure.vars = paste0("Chain:",1:4),variable.name = "Chain",value.name = "Para") %>%
34   group_by(Chain) %>%
35   mutate(ergodic_mean = cumsum(Para)/seq_len(N),
36          Theta = "theta4") %>%
37   as.data.frame()
38 Chain_Para5_erg <-
39   sample_array[,,5] %>%
40   as.data.frame() %>%
41   mutate(Iteration=seq_len(N)) %>%
42   melt(id.vars = "Iteration", measure.vars = paste0("Chain:",1:4),variable.name = "Chain",value.name = "Para") %>%
43   group_by(Chain) %>%
44   mutate(ergodic_mean = cumsum(Para)/seq_len(N),
45          Theta = "theta5") %>%
46   as.data.frame()
47 Chain_erg <- 
48   Chain_Para1_erg %>% 
49   rbind(Chain_Para2_erg) %>%
50   rbind(Chain_Para3_erg) %>%
51   rbind(Chain_Para4_erg) %>%
52   rbind(Chain_Para5_erg) %>%
53   mutate(Theta_c = recode(Theta,
54                           "theta1" = "theta[1]",
55                           "theta2" = "theta[2]",
56                           "theta3" = "theta[3]",
57                           "theta4" = "theta[4]",
58                           "theta5" = "theta[5]")
59   )
60 ## Implement ergodic mean plot
61 Chain_erg %>%
62   group_by(Chain) %>%
63   ggplot(aes(x=Iteration, y=ergodic_mean, colour=Chain, group=Chain)) +
64   facet_grid(rows = vars(Theta_c), labeller = label_parsed) +
65   geom_line() +
66   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
67   theme(panel.grid.major =element_blank(), 
68         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
69         panel.background = element_blank(),
70         axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
71         strip.background = element_rect(
72           color = "white", fill = "white"),
73         panel.grid = element_blank(),
74         legend.key = element_rect(
75           color = "white", 
76           fill = "white"),
77         strip.text.y = element_text(size = 15,angle = 0),
78         plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) +
79   theme(axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -0.1),
80         axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15))) +
81   theme(legend.key = element_rect(color = NA, fill = NA),
82         legend.key.size = unit(35, "pt")) +
83   theme(legend.title.align = 0.5) +
84   ylab("Ergodic Mean") +
85   scale_color_discrete(labels = c(expression(paste(theta^(0)==symbol(J)[1])),
86                                   expression(paste(theta^(0)==symbol(J)[2])),
87                                   expression(paste(theta^(0)==symbol(J)[3])),
88                                   expression(paste(theta^(0)==symbol(J)[4]))))

Traceplot

1 color_scheme_set("mix-blue-red")
2 mcmc_trace(sample_array, n_warmup = 2500,
3            facet_args = list(ncol = 1, strip.position = "right", labeller = ggplot2::label_parsed)) +
4   theme(panel.grid.major =element_blank(), 
5         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
6         panel.background = element_blank(),
7         axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
8         strip.background = element_rect(
9           color = "white", fill = "white"),
10         panel.grid = element_blank(),
11         legend.key = element_rect(
12           color = "white", 
13           fill = "white"),
14         axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 0),
15         legend.position = "top",
16         legend.spacing.x = unit(1.0, 'cm'),
17         legend.key.size = unit(20, "pt"),
18         legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
19         legend.title = element_text(size = 14)) +
20   scale_color_discrete(name = "Chain", labels = c(expression(paste(theta^(0)==symbol(J)[1])),
21                                   expression(paste(theta^(0)==symbol(J)[2])),
22                                   expression(paste(theta^(0)==symbol(J)[3])),
23                                   expression(paste(theta^(0)==symbol(J)[4])))) 
## Scale for colour is already present.
## Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.

Eliminating the Burn-in period data(The previous 2500)

1 Elim_n <- 2500
2 Elim_sub <- c(1:Elim_n, (N + 1):(N + Elim_n), (2 * N + 1):(2 * N + Elim_n),(3 * N + 1):(3 * N + Elim_n))
3 sample_p1_elim <- sample_p1[-Elim_sub]
4 sample_p2_elim <- sample_p2[-Elim_sub]
5 sample_p3_elim <- sample_p3[-Elim_sub]
6 sample_p4_elim <- sample_p4[-Elim_sub]
7 sample_p5_elim <- sample_p5[-Elim_sub]
8 sample_array_elim <- array(c(sample_p1_elim,sample_p2_elim,sample_p3_elim,sample_p4_elim,sample_p5_elim),
9                            c(N-Elim_n,4,5),dimnames = list(NULL,dim2,dim3))
10 names(dimnames(sample_array_elim)) <- c("Iteration", "Chain", "Parameter")

Autocorrelation

1 color_scheme_set("green")
2 mcmc_acf(sample_array_elim, lags = 20) + 
3   hline_at(0.5, linetype = 2, size = 0.15, color = "gray") +
4   theme(panel.grid.major =element_blank(), 
5         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
6         panel.background = element_blank(),
7         strip.background.x = element_rect(fill = "white"),
8         strip.background.y = element_rect(fill = "white"),
9         axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), size = 10),
10         axis.title.x = element_text(vjust = -0.1, size = 10)) +
11   facet_grid(Chain~Parameter,labeller = label_parsed)

Effective sample size

1 ess_Vari <- function(Chain) {
2   C_N <- length(Chain)
3   V <- map_dbl(seq_len(C_N - 1),
4                function(t) {
5                  mean(diff(Chain, lag = t) ^ 2, na.rm = TRUE)
6                }
7   )
8   return(V)
9 }
10 ess <- function(Chain_all,Chain_n, para_n){
11   V = 0
12   para_all = c(0)[-1]
13   for(i in 1:Chain_n){
14     V = V + ess_Vari(Chain_all[[i]][(Elim_n+1):N,para_n])
15     para_all = c(para_all,Chain_all[[i]][(Elim_n+1):N,para_n])
16   }
17   rho <- head_while(1 - V / 2 / var(para_all), ~ . > 0)
18   (N-Elim_n)*Chain_n / (1 + sum(rho))
19 }
20 ess_para1 <- ess(Chain_all,4, 1)
21 ess_para2 <- ess(Chain_all,4, 2)
22 ess_para3 <- ess(Chain_all,4, 3)
23 ess_para4 <- ess(Chain_all,4, 4)
24 ess_para5 <- ess(Chain_all,4, 5) 
25 ess_para1 
## [1] 30000
1 ess_para2 
## [1] 30000
1 ess_para3 
## [1] 30000
1 ess_para4
## [1] 30000
1 ess_para5
## [1] 30000

Compare MCMC estimates to “true” parameter values

1 sample_rbind_para <- rbind(sample_array_elim[,1,],sample_array_elim[,2,],sample_array_elim[,3,],sample_array_elim[,4,])
2 ## mean
3 est_mean <- apply(sample_rbind_para , 2, mean)
4 true_mean <- sqrt(diag(Sigma)) * sqrt(2/pi)
5 ## var
6 est_var <- apply(sample_rbind_para, 2, var)
7 true_var <- diag(Sigma) * (1 - 2/pi)
8 ## rho
9 D <- diag(sqrt(diag(Sigma)))
10 original_R <- solve(D) %*% Sigma %*% solve(D)
11 true_R <- matrix(0,5,5)
12 for(i in 1:5){
13   for(j in 1:5){
14     if(i == j){
15       true_R[i,j] <- 1
16     }
17     else{
18       true_R[i,j] <- est_corr(sig1 = Sigma[i,i], sig2 = Sigma[j,j], rho = original_R[i,j])
19     }
20   }
21 }
22 # true_R <- R
23 est_R <- cor(sample_rbind_para)
24 # result
25 true_mean 
## [1] 1.2181727 1.4369331 1.1666197 0.6990073 0.7650240
1 est_mean
##  theta[1]  theta[2]  theta[3]  theta[4]  theta[5] 
## 1.2159380 1.4474324 1.1675043 0.6744651 0.7581627
1 sqrt(true_var)
## [1] 0.9203425 1.0856182 0.8813936 0.5281075 0.5779838
1 sqrt(est_var)
##  theta[1]  theta[2]  theta[3]  theta[4]  theta[5] 
## 0.9281368 1.0944665 0.8829489 0.5096149 0.5723365
1 true_R
##            [,1]        [,2]       [,3]        [,4]        [,5]
## [1,] 1.00000000 0.082623053 0.32557860 0.081379738 0.006377610
## [2,] 0.08262305 1.000000000 0.11967936 0.032572300 0.004885203
## [3,] 0.32557860 0.119679355 1.00000000 0.128773673 0.019271258
## [4,] 0.08137974 0.032572300 0.12877367 1.000000000 0.000167299
## [5,] 0.00637761 0.004885203 0.01927126 0.000167299 1.000000000
1 est_R
##              theta[1]    theta[2]   theta[3]     theta[4]      theta[5]
## theta[1]  1.000000000 0.090533287 0.31446455 0.0054497968 -0.0031901986
## theta[2]  0.090533287 1.000000000 0.13522591 0.1150553210  0.0047728367
## theta[3]  0.314464555 0.135225914 1.00000000 0.0372826400  0.0150708152
## theta[4]  0.005449797 0.115055321 0.03728264 1.0000000000  0.0003936865
## theta[5] -0.003190199 0.004772837 0.01507082 0.0003936865  1.0000000000

MCSE

1 ### theta1
2 sd(sample_rbind_para[,1])/ess_para1
## [1] 3.093789e-05
1 ### theta2
2 sd(sample_rbind_para[,2])/ess_para2
## [1] 3.648222e-05
1 ### theta3
2 sd(sample_rbind_para[,3])/ess_para3
## [1] 2.943163e-05
1 ### theta4
2 sd(sample_rbind_para[,4])/ess_para4
## [1] 1.698716e-05
1 ### theta5
2 sd(sample_rbind_para[,5])/ess_para5
## [1] 1.907788e-05

PSRF: R^hat

1 sample_cbind_para <- cbind(sample_array_elim[,1,],sample_array_elim[,2,],sample_array_elim[,3,],sample_array_elim[,4,])
2 J = 4
3 L = N-Elim_n
4 col_index <- matrix(0,length(x_init),Chain_n)
5 for(j in 1:length(x_init)){
6   col_index[j,] <- which(colnames(sample_cbind_para) == colnames(sample_rbind_para)[j])
7 }
8 for(j in 1:length(x_init)){
9   x_j_mean <- apply(sample_cbind_para, 2, mean)[col_index[j,]]
10   x_mean <- apply(sample_rbind_para, 2, mean)[j]
11   B <- L/(J-1) * sum((x_j_mean - x_mean)^2)
12   sj2 <- 1/(L-1) * apply((sample_cbind_para[,col_index[j,]] - x_j_mean)^2,2,sum)
13   W <- 1/J * sum(sj2)
14   R <- ((L-1)/L * W + 1/L * B + B/(L*J))/W
15   print(R)
16 }
## [1] 1.000047
## [1] 1.000098
## [1] 1.000131
## [1] 1.000138
## [1] 0.9998964

REM

1 sum(abs(true_mean - est_mean))/sum(abs(true_mean))
